ops.body:
Closed via the E12 **scoped judged probe** (2026-07-14), the substitute for the full corrected paired gate chosen when the judged budget was redirected to the one open question. Discipline held: preregistered before spend (`cells/probe_prereg.json` + `phases/probe_prereg.done`); free coverage CID run before any judge spend and it **collapsed** (v001's 22 drafts → 1 unique string, attractor 1.0, grounding 0.0), triggering the prereg'd off-ramp; verdict journaled (`results/E12/verdict.md`, verdict_sha `cbfadc467ffb99a4`; `phases/probe.done` + `final.done`; E12 log entry #9 with verdict attached).

Verdict: **EMPTY FIRES, no promotion.** v001's 22-row warranted "coverage lead" is empty-context flooring (all 22 are malformed eval-v2 rows with empty context; v001 rates them at its global P(NO_STEER) floor and drafts one unrelated boilerplate string, would_have_helped 0/22), not help. The full paired gate is moot: M3 already fails a free arm (same-render AUC 0.8402 < 002's 0.8607) and the 8B's only rich-context warranted fires (M3×3, 002×1) judged 0/4 helpful. Spend: 3 live judge calls (of ≤30 approved). Follow-ups spun out: amend the corrected gate's coverage arm (data-validity filter + helpful-coverage) and the eval-v3 empty-context-row fix — see note 115613d.
